**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the v5.7 fake factory and 'front shop, back factory' demotion probe. The enterprise is registered as 'Electronic Device Manufacturing,' and its business scope explicitly includes the manufacturing of 'power adapters, circuit boards (PCBs), and power cords.' However, the probe immediately captured a severe mismatch in its space and capital: the paid-in capital is only 1.01 million, with 6 employees. Even more fatal is its registered address: 'Second Floor, Unit B, No. 300 Zhihui Road, Qilin Technology Innovation Park.' The probe's spatial logic engine identified that this is located in the same office area on the same floor as previous data (Nanjing Zhenyi Intelligent Technology, another 0-employee IT trading shell). In a 2nd-floor office building within an innovation park, it is absolutely impossible for a PCB production line requiring highly toxic chemicals for etching to exist, nor is it possible to set up power cord extruders. Combined with its micro-scale of 6 employees, the system exposed its 'manufacturing' disguise: this is a typical Micro Power Adapter Reseller & PCBA Design Outsourcer. In their second-floor office, these 6 individuals either draw circuit diagrams and outsource prototyping, or directly purchase finished chargers and cables from Shenzhen/Dongguan to rebrand and resell, possessing absolutely no heavy-asset manufacturing capabilities.
